expected.explanation: 10 minus 4 is 6, times 3 is 18, divided by 2 is 9.
100 divided by 4 is 25, 7 times 3 is 21, 25 plus 21 is 46.
100 minus 25 is 75, 5 times 3 is 15, 75 divided by 15 is 5.
Negative 5 times 3 is negative 15, plus 20 equals 5.
Following order of operations, 3 times 4 is 12 first, then 2 plus 12 equals 14.
2 plus 3 is 5, 4 minus 1 is 3, 5 times 3 is 15, 15 divided by 5 is 3, 3 plus 10 equals 13.
